reviews.author: Bheemsingh Bora
reviews.review_body: My children are studying since nursery. School has made them confident and independent enough. Good cooperation till date.

reviews.author: MANYA KAUSHIK
reviews.review_body:
Extremely happy with the kind of activities organised in school for children’s physical, social and intellectual development and I appreciate all that the school does for the success of its students.

Highly recommended!

reviews.author: Adamya soni Eneur
reviews.review_body: Good school with better learning environment for students. Teachers and staff are polite. Highly recommended

reviews.author: Neerupama Bhatnagar
reviews.review_body: The bus drivers are extremely rash, risking the lives of students on board. One of the drivers' kept honking without any reason and drove dangerously. I would encourage the school authorities to look into this, since numerous parents send their kids through school buses.

reviews.author: Vajid Gavandi
reviews.review_body:
Very very bad 👎 experience...my husband and me thought to enquire for admission of my daughter....and went ther at exact 12:58 pm today and called at reception and told them we standing outside and said as there I can check on school notice board that admission enquiry is till 1 pm ....so please allow us to visit and enquire about admission...but the lady on reception took 15 minute of hold and didn't allow.
Pathetic
is already 1:15  now
